NEXUS COMMAND

WEBGL BUILD // RANDOM BATTLEFIELDS // SIX COALITIONS // THREE RESOURCES

Six regional powers fight for a freshly generated continent — rivers, lakes, rock ridges, and fields of crystal, coolant and alloy. Harvest all three, build, scheme, and conquer.

AMERICAN FEDERATION (YOU)Balanced. Win when everyone left standing is you or your ally.
EUROPEAN CONCORDDiplomats & traders. Ally and trade readily.
PAN-AFRICAN UNIONIndustrial builders. Steady, resilient economy.
GULF COALITIONMerchant power. Brokers alloy and crystals.
EASTERN BLOCMilitarists. They will come for you.
OCEANIC LEAGUECovert. Steals and sabotages, even in peace.
  • Drag select · Right-click move / attack / harvest · T attack-move · Ctrl+1-9 set group, 1-9 recall
  • Scroll with W A S D / arrows, middle-mouse drag, or the radar map — the screen never drifts on its own
  • Space pause · [ ] game speed 1×/2×/3× · Del sell selected structure · Walls & Gates funnel attackers into your turrets
  • WATCH THE MAP: neglected neutral towns revolt — sustained uprisings forge a hostile FREE LEGION faction. Govern or be overrun.
  • ECONOMY: harvest crystals (currency), coolant (cools heavy units) & alloy (builds advanced war machines). Each base is rich in some, poor in others — expand to thrive.
  • SOCIETY: build Habitats & Markets to grow a happy population — they work faster (labor) and can be C conscripted into troops. Neglect them and they revolt. Recruit or intimidate neutral settlements for more people.
  • DIPLOMACY: gifts, trade pacts (resources flow both ways), alliances (shared vision, allies join your wars), war, and SUE FOR PEACE — broker a ceasefire to end a war (a beaten foe will sue for peace itself)
  • OPS (needs Cyber Ops Center): E EMP · H Hijack · covert theft, sabotage, recon, incitement · incite coups
  • VICTORY: wipe out every rival faction. Take a neutral ★ Command Relay by standing on it (income + vision) — right‑click a relay with troops selected to send them to seize & hold it. Once a relay is owned you must be at war with its holder to take it; turning on a friend's relay means turning on them.

CHOOSE YOUR LEADER'S DOCTRINE

VICTORY

CONTROLS & LEGEND

EVERY LEVER YOU HAVE, COMMANDER

  • SELECT & ORDER — Drag marquee · Left-click select · Right-click move / attack / harvest / guard · T attack-move
  • REPAIR RIG — mends friendly units AND buildings (right‑click a damaged unit to escort‑heal it, or a damaged building to mend it; idle rigs auto‑seek the wounded). Burns WOOD — needs a Lumber Mill + logged forest, or it can't repair anything.
  • PATROL — select combat units, press P (or tap ⚑ PATROL) and click a spot → they guard that whole area and hunt any enemy that enters it (far beyond weapon range)
  • CONTROL GROUPS — Ctrl+1-9 assign · 1-9 recall
  • BATTLEFIELD FEED — alerts marked ⌖ (inbound missiles, uprisings, the Legion rising, relay grabs) are clickable → jump the camera to where it happened
  • CAMERA — W A S D / arrows · middle-mouse drag · radar-map click/drag (the view never drifts on its own)
  • TEMPO — Space pause/resume · [ ] game speed 1×/2×/3× · M mute
  • BUILD — CONSTRUCT then place · Del/Backspace sell selected structure · Walls & Gates shape chokepoints (your units pass your gate; enemies route around)
  • SOCIETY — grow population (Habitat / Market); C conscript; recruit or intimidate neutral settlements (loot + recruits on capture)
  • COMBINE COLLECTORS — select 2+ harvesters / tankers / haulers / loggers and press G (or tap ⊕ COMBINE) to merge them into one mega‑collector that gathers ×N — same output, one unit (saves resources + micro)
  • CYBER (Cyber Ops Center) — E EMP · H Hijack · V Overcharge (combat stim: your units in a zone hit harder & move faster 9s) · L Minefield (scatter hidden proximity mines — enemies trip them) · N Ballistic & B Thermonuclear missile (need a Missile Silo; an Iron Dome intercepts) · O Orbital Ion Strike — surgical & UNINTERCEPTABLE (Silo)
  • SPECTRE (Cyber Ops Center) — a cloaked strike skimmer: invisible & untargetable until it fires or an enemy gets close. Great for raids — and watch for enemy ones: keep forces spread so something spots them.
  • GARRISON — right‑click a friendly building with infantry selected to move them inside: they fire from cover & are shielded until it falls (then spill out wounded). Press U to unload.
  • THE FREE LEGION — neglect ungoverned towns and they revolt; sustained uprisings coalesce into a hostile new faction. Govern the map or face it — or, once you've bloodied them, SUE FOR PEACE in the Diplomacy panel.
  • VICTORY — destroy every rival faction, including any that emerge. Hold ★ Command Relays for income + vision (right‑click one to send selected troops to seize it).
